---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

<Describe the feature in a sentence or two.>

## Why

<What does this enable that the current app doesn't? What problem does it solve?>

## How you imagine it working

<Sketch of the UX or behavior. Doesn't have to be detailed; this section is for shared understanding, not specification.>

## Scope

<Is this V1.x scope (small additions), V0.2 scope (a release worth of work), or further out?>

## Alternatives

<Other ways the same goal could be achieved. Things you considered and discarded.>
